name: Singapura Finance Ltd
summary: Singapura Finance Ltd engages in the financing business in Singapore. The company offers savings and fixed deposits; business accounts; and mortgage/HDB, car, pleasure craft, gold share, and wise share loans; and commercial and industrial property, equipment and machinery, inventory, property development, commercial vehicle, vessel, and enterprise financing services. It also provides block discounting, business overdrafts, safe deposit boxes, and SMS banking services. Singapura Finance Ltd was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Singapore.
